calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The case came as reassigment from 206 for court trial.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lee Batara.
This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff Bornstein Realty,
No appearance by defendants: Darrell Maxwell and Cullin Bax
Witness: Pablo Tisker was sworn & examined.
The following exhibits were identified and moved into evidence:
Exhibit 1- Contract
Exhibit 2- Three Day Notice
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Bornstein Realty and against the defendants: Darrell Maxwell and Cullin Bax as follows:
Restitution and possession of premises located at: 655 Tenessee, #203, SF.
Rental agreement forfeited.
Back rent of $5,200.00
Damages of $4,159.88
Costs of $220.60
For the total of $9580.48.
Attorney fees per motion.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Assigned To Trial Court
